home.heroSubtitle: Get-Filly is an AI platform for restaurants. It runs your marketing, reviews and visibility in Google and AI search engines. With your approval, each message goes out through the right channel at the moment it drives the most bookings.
home.whySubtitle: The numbers don't lie. Better profiles and a steady rhythm mean guests find you online more often.

profile.title: A complete profile gets found 2.3x more often

reviews.title: Recent reviews count for more than the overall total

posting.title: Posting consistently: 3 to 5 times a week is the sweet spot

pricing.heroTitle: Choose the plan that fits your restaurant.
pricing.heroSubtitle: No hidden costs. No long contracts. Just more guests at the table.

growth.desc: For restaurants that want to be found online and become more visible on social media, without spending time on it themselves.
features: Better visibility in Google through SEO optimisation
Visibility on TripAdvisor, TheFork and OpenTable
Visibility in AI search engines like ChatGPT, Claude and Gemini
Content planning for Instagram, TikTok and Facebook
AI-generated posts in your restaurant's tone of voice
Live dashboard with reporting on visibility and reach

ultimate.desc: Everything in Growth, plus direct campaigns via email and WhatsApp based on your occupancy data. Includes a connection with your reservation system.
features: Connection with Zenchef, TheFork or Guestplan
Automatic email campaigns based on occupancy
Segmentation by regular, new and dormant guests
Personalised email and WhatsApp campaigns in your restaurant's tone of voice

pricing.helpSub: Book a free intro call and we'll go through it together.

faqs.a: You're fully onboarded within a day. You connect your reservation system and your Google Business profile, confirm your menu, and Get-Filly starts working for you the same day.
Email, WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and Google Business. Get-Filly writes for each channel in your house style and schedules every message at the best moment for the right audience.

faqs.q: Do I stay in control of what Get-Filly sends?
faqs.a: Yes. Get-Filly generates proposals, you approve or adjust them. Nothing goes out without your approval.

faqs.q: How does Get-Filly know which action to propose?
faqs.a: Get-Filly continuously analyses your occupancy and social media data, recognises patterns such as recurring dips or seasonal trends, and proposes a targeted action at the right moment.
Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect on the first day of the next month. Unused days are settled.
No. Get-Filly is made precisely for owners without marketing knowledge. You get ready-made proposals that you approve or adjust with one click, Get-Filly does the rest.

faqs.q: How and when do I pay?
faqs.a: Payment runs through our payment partner Stripe, by credit card, SEPA direct debit or iDEAL. You pay in advance per month or per year, with no hidden costs.
Yes. You cancel monthly through your dashboard, before the end of the current period. After that Get-Filly stays available until the end of the period you already paid for.

faqs.q: What happens to my guests' data?
faqs.a: You remain the owner of your guest data. Get-Filly processes it solely on your behalf, under a data processing agreement in line with the GDPR. We never sell your data and don't use it for our own advertising.

All data travels encrypted over the line via TLS and we take appropriate technical and organisational measures in line with the GDPR. If we work with a supplier outside the EU, for example for AI, we put the legally required safeguards in place.

pricing.ctaSub: Email us, we're happy to help.
pricing.ctaProduct: Want to see what Get-Filly does first? Check out <link>the solution</link>.

product.heroSubtitle: Get-Filly detects quiet moments, works out the right action and picks the right audience, for campaigns, reviews and your visibility in Google and AI search engines. With your approval, Get-Filly puts it live automatically, so you get more bookings.

approve.title: AI does the work, you approve
approve.desc: From spotting quiet moments to setting up complete campaigns: Get-Filly automates the whole process for more guests and revenue.

noMarketing.title: No marketing knowledge needed
noMarketing.desc: Get-Filly does the work of a marketing agency, but automatically, faster and entirely based on your data.

integrates.title: Fits your systems
integrates.desc: You keep your reservation platform, POS and socials. Get-Filly integrates in a few clicks, not a switch but your partner.

measures.title: Measures what really works
measures.desc: No open rates or clicks that get you nowhere, but insight into how many bookings, guests and revenue each campaign actually delivers.

product.walkTitle: A week with Get-Filly, from empty seats to a full house.
product.walkSubtitle: Follow a campaign from start to finish. Three minutes of work for a week full of extra bookings.

detection.label: Detection
detection.title: Get-Filly detects a dip and flags it.
detection.desc: Get-Filly continuously watches your reservation data. A Thursday at 38% isn't a disaster, as long as you know in time. Get-Filly sends you one message: “Thursday is lagging, shall I run something?”

proposal.label: Proposal
proposal.title: Three channels, one proposal, ready within a minute.
proposal.desc: Get-Filly proposes a complete campaign: an email to regulars, an Instagram post for late bookers, and a WhatsApp message for your most loyal guests. Tone of voice, imagery and timing, all tailored to your restaurant.

approval.label: Approval
approval.title: One approval, Get-Filly does the rest.
approval.desc: Get-Filly sends all three messages at the right moment, on the right channel and to the right guests. You approve once, and after that you don't have to worry about timing or separate channels.

placement.label: Publishing
placement.title: You see your post go live, right on time.
placement.desc: On Thursday Get-Filly publishes the Instagram post and story automatically, the moment late bookers are scrolling. You don't have to do a thing, you just see it pass by in your feed, fully in your style, while the bookings come in.

result.label: Result
result.title: Result: 12 extra bookings on a quiet Thursday.
result.desc: At the end of the week Get-Filly checks in with a short summary: what worked, which channel scored, and what could be different next time.

mock.mailPreview: “A quiet Thursday? Come for lunch for €24.50.”
mock.waPreview: “Hi! Still room at our kitchen table tomorrow, book here.”
mock.approveFoot: Get-Filly checks in on Sunday with the results.
mock.igCaptionText: A few tables still free tonight. Three courses for €24.50. #thursdaydeal
mock.resultNote: Email worked best, next time I'll scale that one up first.

occupancy.title: Occupancy analysis
occupancy.desc: Real-time insight into your occupancy per day, week and month. Get-Filly recognises patterns such as recurring dips or seasonal trends and shows you straight away where you're missing revenue.

chatbot.title: AI chatbot
chatbot.desc: Chat with Get-Filly like you'd talk to a colleague. It knows your data and restaurant, makes proposals and carries them out after your approval.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.desc: From concept to send in one chat. Get-Filly writes an email or WhatsApp message in your house style, selects the right guests and sends it at the best moment.

social.title: Social media posts
social.desc: Get-Filly creates posts for Instagram, Facebook and TikTok. Tailored to your brand, your offering, and the days that need filling.

season.title: Seasonal strategy
season.desc: Valentine's Day, asparagus season, King's Day, Christmas, Get-Filly thinks ahead. You get proposals automatically, weeks in advance.

google.title: Google Business
google.desc: Appear at the top of Google when people search for restaurants nearby. Get-Filly publishes posts, replies to reviews and keeps your profile up to date so you get found more easily.

cookies.body: We use cookies and similar techniques to run the site and, only with your consent, for analytics so we can improve Get-Filly. No tracking for ads, no selling data to third parties. <link>Read our privacy policy</link>.

story.p1: The best restaurant isn't always full, but the most findable one is. We saw it everywhere: places with fantastic food and loyal guests, yet still a few empty tables. Not because they did anything wrong, but because marketing has become a profession of its own. A profession you need an expensive agency for, or your own time and attention that you'd rather spend on your guests.
story.p2: And the tools that are supposed to fix that? They're built for chains with a marketing department. Not for the owner who wants to grow their place their own way.
story.p3: We put an end to that. Get-Filly takes over the marketing work, runs on your own data and comes up with proposals itself. All you have to do is say yes. No empty promises, no jargon. Just more guests at the table.

about.alt1: Quiet restaurant with just a single table occupied
about.alt2: The same restaurant filling up, several tables occupied
about.alt3: The same restaurant completely full, guests at every table
about.missionText: Help independent restaurants grow without the owner drowning in marketing. We take the work off your hands, so you can focus on what you're good at: your place and your guests.
about.visionText: A hospitality world where every local restaurant has the same marketing power as a big chain. Without a marketing department, without an expensive agency, and without needing any technical know-how.

ownerFirst.title: Owner first
ownerFirst.desc: The owner shouldn't have to spend hours on marketing or website optimisation. Get-Filly does the work, you focus on your guests and service.

ownData.title: Your data, your choices
ownData.desc: Your occupancy data and guest list stay yours. No reselling, you're never locked in, everything is exportable.

aiPays.title: AI that pays for itself
aiPays.desc: No AI for the sake of AI. We put your data to work for extra bookings and more revenue.

ch1: Get-Filly founded by two ambitious friends
ch2: Roll out Get-Filly nationally across the Netherlands
ch3: First Benelux, then the DACH region

campagnes_id_components_campaign_perform.title: Performance
campagnes_id_components_campaign_perform.emptyState: No measurement data yet. Performance is recorded once the campaign becomes 'active' and Resend events come in (delivered, opens, clicks). Reservations that come in through this campaign are counted here too.
campagnes_id_components_campaign_perform.markOutlierLink: Mark as outlier ("out of our control")
campagnes_id_components_campaign_perform.outlierPrompt: Why is this campaign outside your control? The reason goes into Filly's learning loop as context (e.g. "bad weather", "strike", "atypical event").
campagnes_id_components_campaign_perform.markedWithReason: Marked as outlier: "{reason}". Filly ignores this campaign in its learning loop.
campagnes_id_components_campaign_perform.markedNoReason: Marked as outlier. Filly ignores this campaign in its learning loop.

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.desc: The basics: type, cuisine and price range.
restaurant.multiBusiness: Multiple businesses? Add a second location or new concept, you can switch between them via the account menu at the top left.
restaurant.name: Name

location.title: Location
location.desc: Automatically geocoded via PDOK as soon as you save. Required for the weather integration and local campaigns.

closedDates.title: Closing dates & holidays
closedDates.desc: Specific days when the business is closed (holidays, public holidays). Filly avoids these for mailings and reservation suggestions.
closedDates.empty: No closing dates. Add one for example for Christmas Day or your regular holiday week.

capacity.title: Capacity
capacity.desc: Occupancy percentages are based on this.
capacity.weekdayOccupancyHint: Optional goal for the occupancy KPI on your dashboard. Leave empty to use Filly's calculation from your 6-month history (or the default 68% if you haven't built up any history yet).
capacity.terraceSunLabel: When does the sun reach the terrace?
capacity.terraceSunHint: Click to toggle. Filly uses this for sunny-day actions on your terrace.
capacity.terraceTypeHint: Determines whether Filly can still suggest a terrace action in the rain (covered/convertible) or only in dry weather (open).

servicePeriods.title: Service times
servicePeriods.desc: Set per day when you serve breakfast, lunch and dinner. One or more shifts, you decide. The dashboard uses these times for the weekly and daily occupancy per service.

languages.title: Languages your staff speaks
languages.desc: Click to toggle. Filly takes this into account for multilingual campaigns.

company.title: Company details
company.desc: For mail footers (required under GDPR/CAN-SPAM), your privacy statement and terms and conditions.
company.legalNameHint: As registered with the Chamber of Commerce. Appears in the footer of mailings.

emailSettings.title: Email settings for mailings
emailSettings.desc: Determines how campaign emails look to the recipient.
emailSettings.fromNameHint: Appears in the recipient's inbox as “from”.
emailSettings.replyToHint: Where replies from recipients are sent. May be the same as the contact email.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Decide when reviews and quiet days appear as actions on your campaigns page.
notifications.reviewThresholdLabel: Show reviews at or below this star rating as an action
notifications.reviewThresholdHint: Reviews that don't have a reply yet and fall below this threshold automatically appear in “Other actions”. The default is 3 stars, so only real problems get your attention.
notifications.occupancyThresholdLabel: Occupancy below this threshold counts as a quiet day
notifications.occupancyThresholdHint: Filly scans the next 14 days for quiet days and adds them to “Other actions”. As soon as a day's occupancy reaches the threshold (e.g. through new reservations), it automatically disappears from the list. Closing days are not shown.

events.label: Nearby events in Filly's suggestions
events.hint: Filly weighs nearby events (source: evenementen.nl) and annual public holidays (Valentine's Day, Easter, King's Day, Christmas...) into campaign suggestions and timing. Untick what doesn't fit your business. The maximum distance applies only to nearby events, not to public holidays. “Smart per type” means: markets and funfairs up to 2 km, concerts and sports up to 5 km, festivals up to 10 km. A fixed distance applies to all types, wider is handy in rural areas, tighter in the city center.

autoReply.toggleHint: For new reviews below your threshold, Filly automatically writes a reply in your tone. You stay in control: the reply is prepared as a draft so you can approve it with one click.
autoReply.modeLabel: How does Filly post the reply?
autoReply.modePublish: Post yourself: available once Google is connected
autoReply.modeHint: As long as Google isn't connected, Filly always prepares replies as drafts. Automatic posting becomes available once the Google connection is live.
autoReply.tonePlaceholder: E.g. warm and personal, always thank by name, stay calm and solution-oriented with criticism.
autoReply.toneHint: Leave empty to use the general brand voice you set under Findability › Identity. Fill in something here if you want a different tone for reviews.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.desc: Plan and billing. Billing comes in a later step.

dataPrivacy.title: Data & privacy
dataPrivacy.desc: Under the GDPR (art. 20) you have the right to a complete export of your business data in a readable format.
dataPrivacy.exportHint: Contains: profile details, guests, reservations, menu, campaigns, reviews, chat history and audit log. Logos and menu PDFs are included as URLs in the file, which you can download separately.

deleteAccount.heading: Delete account permanently
deleteAccount.hint: Erases your restaurant + all guests, reservations, menu, campaigns and chat history. After that your login account disappears too. This action is irreversible, so download your data export above first if you want to keep anything.

deleteModal.title: Are you sure?
deleteModal.intro: You are about to delete your entire account. This means:
deleteModal.item1: Your restaurant + all profile details are erased
deleteModal.item2: All guests, reservations, menu and campaigns disappear
deleteModal.item3: Reviews, chat history and audit log are deleted
deleteModal.item4: Your login account (email + password) is erased
deleteModal.item5: Anonymous learning data (cuisine + region + campaign results, no names or addresses) is kept to train Filly, in line with GDPR Recital 26.
deleteModal.deleteError: Deletion failed, please try again or contact support.

dash_account_team_invite_modal.sentHint: Once the recipient clicks the link in the email and logs in, they join your team.
dash_account_team_invite_modal.existingAccount: This person already has a Get-Filly account. Share the link below with them, clicking it gets them in right away.

dash_google_business_components_google_c.title: Connect your Google Business Profile
dash_google_business_components_google_c.subtitle: Search by name and city. Filly fetches your profile info right away.
dash_google_business_components_google_c.emptyState: Type a search query and click Search.

errors.noResults: No results found. Try adding more detail (name and city).

empty.title: Run your first health audit
empty.description: Filly checks your website SEO, Google Business Profile quality, reviews, AI findability and competitors within a 500m radius. Takes about a minute.

scoreDescription.strong: Your findability is in good shape. Work on the last improvements in the tabs below to extend your lead.
scoreDescription.good: The basics are in order, but there are concrete opportunities to score higher. Check the tabs per category for the details.
scoreDescription.room: There is significant room to improve. Focus on the critical actions (red) for the biggest impact.
scoreDescription.work: Your findability needs a lot of attention. The critical actions below deliver the biggest jump right away.

seo.label: Website SEO
seo.desc: Title, meta tags, schema.org, mobile, speed

geo.label: AI findability
geo.desc: Are you mentioned by AI assistants?

categoryHeader.weight: Counts for {weight}% of your total score

seoTab.intro: We check 15 deterministic SEO signals on your homepage plus three Lighthouse categories via Google PageSpeed Insights. Below you see every checked point.
seoTab.comingSoon: Coming soon here too: keyword suggestions that Filly generates for your title, meta description and H1 based on your cuisine and city.

gbpTab.intro: We check 8 core criteria on your Google Business Profile: from business status and completeness to photo volume and categorization. Reviews are in a separate tab.
gbpTab.comingSoon: Coming soon here too: a detailed checklist of all Place fields (phone, address, opening hours) with their current value, so you can see at a glance what is correct and what is missing.

reviewsTab.intro: Reviews health based on your Google profile: count, average rating and thresholds (10+ and 30+) where guest trust noticeably tips.
reviewsTab.comingSoon: Coming soon here too: sentiment analysis on your review text (which topics positive, which negative). For the response ratio and review recency we are waiting for the Google Business Profile API connection (OAuth).

geoTab.intro: We ask Claude (Anthropic) five different questions about good restaurants in your city and check whether you are mentioned. Position in the list counts: top 3 earns full points, lower in the list less. Not mentioned = 0 points.

noChecks.title: No checks available yet
noChecks.description: Run the audit to see results.

overview.noActions: 🎉 No action items, everything looks good.

dash_google_business_benchmark_page.title: Competitor benchmark
dash_google_business_benchmark_page.subtitle: How do you score versus restaurants nearby?
dash_google_business_benchmark_page.emptyTable: No other restaurants found within this radius. Try a larger radius.
dash_google_business_benchmark_page.medianNote: Median figures calculated over {count} competitors. The median is more robust than the average, so one very good or very poor business distorts the picture less.

notConnected.title: Connect Google first
notConnected.description: We need your location from Google Business Profile to build your neighborhood comparison.

dash_google_business_identiteit_page.title: Identity
dash_google_business_identiteit_page.subtitle: The source of truth for all posts and campaigns Filly creates. The more complete it is, the more personal and effective the results.

analyze.noUrlError: Enter your website URL on the Online tab first before Filly can analyze it.
analyze.successMessage: Filly has updated your profile. Check each field and save if you make any further changes.
analyze.failed: Filly analysis failed. Try again or fill it in manually.
analyze.bannerTitle: Let Filly fill in these fields
analyze.fillsFields: and fills in the fields below so you don't have to type everything manually.
analyze.buttonTitleEnabled: Filly reads your website and fills in the fields below
analyze.buttonTitleDisabled: Enter your website URL on the Online tab first
analyze.subsetBasics: This is where your restaurant name, description, audience and location live.
analyze.subsetToon: This is where we set the tone of Filly's posts: atmosphere, writing style, brand story, USPs and awards.
analyze.subsetSeo: This is where SEO keywords and fixed hashtags live that Filly tries to work into every post.

basics.restaurantDesc: The basic details Filly needs in every post.
basics.taglinePlaceholder: Cozy neighborhood bistro in the heart of Amsterdam
basics.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us in detail about your restaurant, history, philosophy...
basics.cuisineHint: Comma-separated. Filly uses this for tone and theme suggestions.
basics.audienceDesc: Who Filly speaks to in its posts. The more specific, the more relevant the copy.
basics.mainAudiencePlaceholder: Local residents, professionals at lunch, families on weekends...
basics.audienceSegmentsHint: Comma-separated. Filly varies tone and offers per segment.
basics.locationDesc: Gives posts local grounding. Good for SEO and for recognition among potential guests.
basics.locationPlaceholder: Heart of De Pijp, behind the Albert Cuyp. Surrounded by shops, bars and coffee spots. Easy to reach by tram 4 (Stadhouderskade stop).
basics.photoLibraryDesc: Images Filly may use in social posts and email templates. Upload several so Filly can pick variety per campaign.
basics.brandingDesc: Logo and brand colors Filly applies in email templates and visual content.
basics.logoUrlHint: Direct link to your logo (PNG or SVG). Upload flow comes in the next round.

toon.atmosphereDesc: The sensory experience Filly can evoke in posts.
toon.atmospherePlaceholder: Warm, intimate, wooden interior, soft jazz, candlelight in the evening...
toon.toneDesc: How Filly writes. Source of truth; was previously implicit from the description.
toon.tonePlaceholder: Playful and informal with dry humor. Avoid corporate speak. Use an informal address.
toon.brandStoryDesc: The story behind the restaurant. Filly weaves it into storytelling posts.
toon.brandStoryPlaceholder: Open since 1985, third generation. We work only with local farmers within 30 km...
toon.doNotMentionDesc: Prevents Filly from making false promises in posts or campaigns.
toon.doNotMentionPlaceholder: No vegan options. No take-away. No halal kitchen. No private room.
toon.strengthsDesc: USPs and signature dishes that may feature prominently in posts.
toon.uspPlaceholder: Own herb garden, open kitchen, weekly changing menu...
toon.signatureDishesPlaceholder: Veal stew, Sea bass with spring onions
toon.signatureDishesHint: Comma-separated. Filly works these into campaign copy.
toon.awardsPlaceholder: Bib Gourmand 2024, organic certification, Tripadvisor Travelers' Choice
toon.awardsHint: Comma-separated. Filly may mention these as social proof in posts.
toon.eventsDesc: E.g. private events, private rooms, group dinners.
toon.eventsPlaceholder: Birthdays, business lunches, wedding dinners, private room for up to 30 people...

seo.keywordsDesc: Words Filly always tries to work into posts. Helps findability in search engines and AI tools.
seo.keywordsPlaceholder: sustainable, seasonal, local, artisanal, italian, pijp
seo.keywordsHint: Comma-separated. Use 5-15 terms that characterize your venue.
seo.hashtagsDesc: Hashtags automatically added to every Instagram/TikTok post.
seo.hashtagsHint: Without the # sign. Filly adds 3-5 platform-specific hashtags per post.

online.websiteDesc: Filly reads your website periodically to keep tone and offerings up to date.
online.websiteNote: Full website analysis (auto-fill of tagline, atmosphere, USPs) remains available for now via the Account page.
online.socialDesc: Filly uses these handles in social campaigns and email footers.

saveBar.changed: {count, plural, one {# field changed} other {# fields changed}}

dash_google_business_page.identityDescription: Source of truth for every post and campaign Filly creates. Tagline, tone, audience, keywords, menu and more.
dash_google_business_page.reviewsDescription: View reviews and let Filly write reply suggestions that fit your business.
dash_google_business_page.auditDescription: Complete findability report: your website's SEO, the quality of your Google Business Profile, reviews, AI visibility and competition within a 500m radius.
dash_google_business_page.editsDescription: View your full Google profile: opening hours, description, contact details and attributes. Editing and pushing to Google arrives once the connection is live.

banner.titlePreview: Preview based on public Google data.
banner.body: The details below come from your public Google profile. Editing and pushing directly to Google, plus posts, Q&A and insights, become active once the Google Business Profile connection is live. You manage the connection via <link>Account → Integrations</link>.

hours.title: Opening hours
hours.empty: No opening hours available from Google yet.

specialDays.title: Special days & closing dates
specialDays.manage: Manage these days via <link>Account → Closing dates</link>. When connected, they are sent to Google as special hours.
specialDays.empty: No special days set. Add them via <link>Account → Closing dates</link> (e.g. Christmas Day or a holiday week).

description.title: Description
description.empty: Google does not show an editorial description for your profile yet.

posts.title: Posts & updates
posts.body: Post offers, events and news directly to your Google profile. Filly suggests the text; you approve it.

qa.title: Questions & answers
qa.body: See questions visitors ask on Google and let Filly suggest fitting answers.

insights.title: Insights
insights.body: How many people search for your profile, click through to your website or call you, straight from Google. Not available via the public data, it comes with the connection.

photoManagement.title: Photo management
photoManagement.body: Upload photos from your Filly library directly to your Google profile.

dash_google_business_reviews_page.title: Reviews
dash_google_business_reviews_page.emptyDescription: Connect your Google Business Profile or TripAdvisor to import reviews automatically, then Filly drafts a fitting reply for every review right away.
dash_google_business_reviews_page.bannerLoadingBody: Loading earlier suggestions or a new set.
dash_google_business_reviews_page.bannerPickOrRegen: Pick a version or generate 3 new ones (max 6).
dash_google_business_reviews_page.bannerPickOnly: Click a version to drop it into the text field.
dash_google_business_reviews_page.bannerMaxBody: Maximum reached, pick your favorite below and tweak it as you like.
dash_google_business_reviews_page.replyPlaceholder: Type your reply here, or let Filly draft one.
dash_google_business_reviews_page.trendVolumeLabel: {count, plural, one {new review this month} other {new reviews this month}}

errors.generate: Filly could not create a suggestion. Try again or write your own.

dash_marketing_components_coming_soon_ch.title: {channelName} performance
dash_marketing_components_coming_soon_ch.subtitle: Reach, engagement and audience data, available once {channelName} is connected.
dash_marketing_components_coming_soon_ch.notAvailableBody: We're working on {approvalDescription} to officially connect your {channelName} account. This typically takes a few weeks. After that we'll get to everything in the overview below right away.
dash_marketing_components_coming_soon_ch.featuresHeading: What you'll see on this page

dash_marketing_components_meta_live_insi.errorFetch: Could not load the live stats. Are Facebook and Instagram connected under Account > Connections?
dash_marketing_components_meta_live_insi.noPageSelected: No Facebook page chosen yet. Connect Facebook and Instagram and pick your page via <link>Account > Connections</link>.

dash_marketing_facebook_page.subtitle: Page reach, reactions and audience data, last 30 days.
dash_marketing_facebook_page.previewBanner: Preview with sample data. This is how your Facebook page will look once Meta App Review is approved and you have connected your FB page. The figures below are fictional.
dash_marketing_facebook_page.fillyAnalysis: Your page likes are stable with slight growth (+12 this week). Your FB audience skews older than on IG (centered on 35-54), which fits higher spending power but a lower engagement rate. Two things stand out: events consistently perform twice as well as photos, so I would keep investing there. And you post very little on Saturday mornings, even though your audience is most active then.
dash_marketing_facebook_page.askFillyForContent: Ask Filly for a content suggestion
dash_marketing_facebook_page.reachChartTabs: Tabs: Reach · Impressions · Engagement · Page likes
dash_marketing_facebook_page.reactionsMixSubtext: {count} reactions on your posts, the breakdown shows how your audience responds emotionally.
dash_marketing_facebook_page.topPostsPattern: Filly's pattern: Events > Videos > Photos > Links for your audience. Strong emotional element (high 'love' reactions), content with warmth and a human touch performs best.

topPosts.winePairing: Wine pairing evening, limited seats available
topPosts.freshPasta: Fresh pasta, handmade, made fresh daily in our open kitchen
topPosts.behindScenes: Behind the scenes, chef Marco prepares the seasonal menu
topPosts.seasonalMenu: Our new seasonal menu is live on the website
topPosts.teamPhoto: Team photo: our brigade in action during the busy Friday night

dash_marketing_facebook_page.bestTimeSubtext: Your FB audience has 2 peak moments: lunch and evening. Suggested peak hour: Thursday 18:00.

events.title: Events perform above average
events.description: Your 2 events (wine pairing and the earlier asparagus week) scored 8.0% engagement, above your FB average of 4.5%. This content format resonates with your audience.
events.hint: Plan 1-2 events next month. A 'live cooking demo' or 'wine pairing with the chef' fits your profile well.

lunch.title: Make better use of the lunch peak
lunch.description: Between 12:00-13:00 your audience is most active on Saturday, but you never post then. People plan their evening at that time.
lunch.hint: Try a Saturday morning post at 11:30 or 12:00, it warms up the evening reservation before they start their search.

engagement.title: Engagement below median
engagement.description: 2.9% vs hospitality median 3.4%, not alarming, but there is room to improve. Your link shares in particular are weak (2.8%).
engagement.hint: Replace link-only posts with photos and put the link in the comment. The FB algorithm penalizes external links heavily.

dash_marketing_instagram_page.subtitle: Reach, engagement and audience, last 30 days.
dash_marketing_instagram_page.previewBanner: Preview with sample data. This is how your Instagram page will look once Meta App Review is approved and you have connected your IG account. The figures below are fictional.
dash_marketing_instagram_page.askFillyForContent: Ask Filly for a content suggestion
dash_marketing_instagram_page.fillyPatternText: warm interior + close-up dishes = a consistently high-performing mix. Reels > Carousels > Photos for your audience.
dash_marketing_instagram_page.bestTimeToPostHint: The darker the cell, the more of your audience is online then. Suggested peak hour: Wednesday 18:00.

dash_marketing_mail_page.title: Mail performance
dash_marketing_mail_page.subtitle: Open rates, click rates and industry comparison, from your Resend data.
dash_marketing_mail_page.summary: {sent} mails sent across {count, plural, one {# campaign} other {# campaigns}}, last {days} days.
dash_marketing_mail_page.footnote: Heatmap (best send time) and trends chart will follow once you have sent more than 10 campaigns, otherwise the picture says little.

empty.title: No mails sent yet
empty.description: As soon as you send your first mail campaign, open rates, click rates and the comparison with the hospitality median will appear here.

dash_marketing_page.title: Marketing
dash_marketing_page.subtitle: How are your channels performing? Filly measures, compares and suggests improvements.

banner.someActive: Mail statistics are live. Social channels follow after the Meta + TikTok approval requests.
banner.noneActive: No channels active. Send a mail campaign first to see your first statistics.

mail.name: Mail
mail.description: Open rates, click rates, best send time and what your best campaigns did, straight from Resend.

instagram.name: Instagram

facebook.name: Facebook
facebook.description: Page reach, post engagement and audience demographics via the Meta Graph API.

summary.noCampaigns: You have not sent any mail campaigns this month yet. You create your first campaign via /campagnes.

summary.openAround: Your open rate of {rate}% is around the hospitality median.
summary.clickAbove: Click rate of {rate}% is {diff}% above the median.
summary.clickLow: Click rate of {rate}% is low, add a clear CTA?
summary.bounceHigh: Heads up: bounce rate is {rate}%, higher than ideal (<2%). Clean up your list.
summary.fallback: You sent {sent} mails across {count} {count, plural, one {campaign} other {campaigns}}. For deeper analysis open the Mail page.

dash_marketing_tiktok_page.approvalDescription: TikTok for Business API access (requires business verification)

features.hashtagPerformance: Hashtag performance: which ones drive the most reach?
features.fillySuggestions: Filly's content suggestions: 'Try behind-the-scenes, it scores 4x better than food shots in your segment'

dash_menu_components_menu_suggestions_ta.pendingIntro: Filly as a sparring partner. 3 suggestions, once a day, meant to show you as a chef different angles, not to cram your menu full. Suggestions don't appear in your actual menu until you accept them.
dash_menu_components_menu_suggestions_ta.rejectedIntro: Previously rejected suggestions from the last 90 days. Changed your mind? Click Add anyway and the dish will appear in your menu after all.

empty.pendingDescription: Click 'Ask Filly for suggestions' above and it will come up with 3 new dishes that fit your business.
empty.rejectedDescription: Suggestions you remove above end up here, so you can revisit a suggestion later.

dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.pageSubtitle: Average occupancy per weekday and per hour, plus Filly ROI and guest retention.
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.emptyDescription: As soon as reservations, guests and campaigns come in, the numbers appear here: average occupancy, revenue, Filly ROI, retention and more. Start with a first campaign or import your guest file.
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.sec1Desc: The basic health of your business: average occupancy, guests, revenue and a comparison with last year.
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.hourCardSubtitle: Pattern across the week · darker cells = busier
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.roiTitle: What has Filly delivered for you?
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.roiDesc: Cumulative contribution from Filly over the past 6 months, based on reservations linked manually or automatically to a Filly campaign.
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.roiEmptyTitle: No reservations linked via Filly yet
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.roiEmptyDescription: Link reservations to a Filly campaign on the reservations page (or wait for the send engine to attribute them automatically), then cumulative figures, a 6-month chart and a per-channel comparison appear here.
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.roiChartSubtitle: Estimated extra revenue (€) via Filly campaigns
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.retentionDesc: Of 100 guests who visited for the first time in month X, how many returned in the following months? High % = loyalty, low % = a chance for Filly to send a win-back.
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.retentionCardSubtitle: Percentage that returned in the following months
dash_rapportages_bezetting_page.marketingDesc: Top campaigns based on status and run time.

dash__components_google_connected_panel.title: Google Business Profile
dash__components_google_connected_panel.notApproved: ✓ Connected. Fetching and managing your profile data will become available once Google approves the API access (under review).
dash__components_google_connected_panel.empty: No managed Google Business Profiles found under this account.
dash__components_google_connected_panel.managedProfiles: Managed profiles via your Google account:

dash__components_kpi_row.notAvailableBody: As soon as your reservations and campaigns come in, the KPIs will appear here.

dash__components_mail_domain_section.sectionDesc: The address your campaign emails are sent from.
dash__components_mail_domain_section.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect this custom domain? Mail will fall back to social@get-filly.com afterwards.

verified.label: Custom domain active: {address}
verified.sub: Emails are sent from your own domain. Replies land directly in your mailbox.

pending.label: DNS check running for {domain}
pending.sub: Add the records below at your DNS host. Then click 'Verify'. DNS propagation can take 5-30 minutes.

failed.label: DNS records not correct yet for {domain}
failed.sub: Check that all records were copied exactly. Some DNS hosts automatically append the domain after the hostname, so correct that if needed.

none.label: Default sending via Get-Filly
none.sub: Your campaign emails come from social@get-filly.com with your restaurant name as the sender. For pure customer branding, you can connect your own domain.

setup.title: Connect custom domain
setup.domainHint: Without http:// or www., just the domain name.
setup.fromHint: The address recipients see in 'From'. Must end with your domain.
setup.note: After creating, you get 4 DNS records to add at your DNS host (TransIP / Versio / Namecheap / etc.). Then you can verify, which usually takes 5-15 minutes after the DNS update.

table.empty: No records available. Try reloading the page.
table.hostnameTip: Hostname tip: at some DNS hosts you don't need to add .your-domain.nl after the hostname yourself, they append it automatically. At others you have to enter the full hostname (e.g. resend._domainkey.your-domain.nl).

campaign.hint: Create a test draft to get to know the flow.

business.label: Business details (legal name + Chamber of Commerce number)
business.hint: Appears in email footers and is required for mailings to guests.

dash__components_restaurant_media_sectio.title: Photo library
dash__components_restaurant_media_sectio.description: Upload photos of your interior, dishes, terrace and team. Filly uses these photos in campaign suggestions and you can reuse them on the campaign page. Max {max} photos, 5MB per photo, JPEG/PNG/WebP.
dash__components_restaurant_media_sectio.uploadFullTitle: Your library is full, delete a photo first
dash__components_restaurant_media_sectio.emptyState: No photos yet. Upload your first photo and Filly automatically generates a description and tags so it can use them in campaigns.
dash__components_restaurant_media_sectio.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this photo? Photos used in earlier campaigns will still be visible there.

dash__components_upcoming_actions_block.lowOccupancyCount: {count, plural, one {# quiet day} other {# quiet days}}
dash__components_upcoming_actions_block.lowOccupancyCovered: {count, plural, one {All {count} quiet day in the next 2 weeks already has a proposal or campaign.} other {All {count} quiet days in the next 2 weeks already have a proposal or campaign.}}
dash__components_upcoming_actions_block.noLowOccupancy: Your occupancy for the next 2 weeks looks good.
dash__components_upcoming_actions_block.specialCount: {count, plural, one {# special day} other {# special days}}
dash__components_upcoming_actions_block.specialCovered: {count, plural, one {All {count} special day in the next 6 weeks already has a proposal or campaign.} other {All {count} special days in the next 6 weeks already have a proposal or campaign.}}
dash__components_upcoming_actions_block.noSpecial: No holidays or themed days are on the calendar for the next 6 weeks.

home.title: Get-Filly — More guests. Fewer empty tables.
home.description: Get-Filly is an AI platform for restaurants. It runs your marketing, reviews and visibility in Google and AI search engines.

product.title: The solution
product.description: Discover how Get-Filly detects quiet moments, works out the right action and, with your approval, puts campaigns live via email, social and WhatsApp for more bookings.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: See Get-Filly's plans. No hidden costs, no long contracts, just more guests at the table. Find the plan that fits your restaurant.

about.title: About
about.description: Get-Filly was founded by two entrepreneurs with one mission: help hospitality turn quiet moments into revenue, without hours of work or big marketing budgets.

contact.title: Contact & demo
contact.description: Request a demo or book a free intro with Get-Filly. We are happy to show you how AI gets more bookings from your existing guests.

blog.title: The marketing cocktail
blog.description: Insights on AI marketing, online findability and higher occupancy for hospitality, from Get-Filly.
